# Rufinamide 相關新聞

[← 返回新聞總覽]({{ '/news/' | relative_url }})

---

<p class="key-answer" data-question="Rufinamide 有什麼相關新聞？">
<strong>Rufinamide</strong> 目前有 <strong>23 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 20 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Rufinamide 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Inovelon is indicated as adjunctive therapy in the treatment of seizures associated with Lennox Gastaut syndrome in patients 4 years of age and older.</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>Lennox-Gastaut syndrome（99.6%）</li>
<li>febrile infection-related epilepsy syndrome（99.6%）</li>
<li>perioral myoclonia with absences（99.5%）</li>
<li>photosensitive occipital lobe epilepsy（99.4%）</li>
<li>cryptogenic late-onset epileptic spasms（99.4%）</li>
<li>atypical childhood epilepsy with centrotemporal spikes（99.4%）</li>
<li>cutis verticis gyrata（98.7%）</li>
<li>trigeminal nerve neoplasm（97.9%）</li>
<li>benign occipital epilepsy（97.8%）</li>
<li>childhood onset epileptic encephalopathy（97.7%）</li>
<li>early-onset epileptic encephalopathy and intellectual disability due to GRIN2A mutation（96.4%）</li>
<li>renal-hepatic-pancreatic dysplasia（96.3%）</li>
<li>polycystic kidney disease 3 with or without polycystic liver disease（95.5%）</li>
<li>Joubert syndrome with renal defect（95.4%）</li>
<li>karyomegalic interstitial nephritis（95.2%）</li>
<li>thoracic malformation（95.2%）</li>
<li>adult familial nephronophthisis-spastic quadriparesia syndrome（95.0%）</li>
<li>early onset absence epilepsy（94.9%）</li>
<li>acute encephalopathy with biphasic seizures and late reduced diffusion（94.9%）</li>
<li>trigeminal neuralgia（93.5%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
<p><a href="{{ '/drugs/rufinamide/' | relative_url }}">查看完整藥物報告 →</a></p>
</div>

<style>
.indication-matched {
  background: #fff3e0;
  padding: 4px 8px;
  border-radius: 4px;
  border-left: 3px solid #ff9800;
}
.indication-tag {
  display: inline-block;
  background: #ff9800;
  color: white;
  padding: 2px 8px;
  border-radius: 12px;
  font-size: 0.8em;
  margin-left: 8px;
}
.news-indication-tag {
  display: inline-block;
  background: #ff9800;
  color: white;
  padding: 2px 10px;
  border-radius: 12px;
  font-size: 0.85em;
  margin-left: 4px;
}
.news-drug-tag {
  display: inline-block;
  background: #1565c0;
  color: white;
  padding: 2px 10px;
  border-radius: 12px;
  font-size: 0.85em;
  margin-left: 4px;
}
</style>
